name: Vercel Templates Hub
focus: official starter discovery across product categories
teaches: how modern starters are categorized by product need
broad skeletons for AI apps, SaaS, blogs, docs, and dashboards
what a strong official starter ecosystem looks like
how to avoid beginning from a weak blank page
inspect: starter repos linked from the hub
avoid: treating a starter as the final product direction
pulling in a template because it is convenient instead of because it fits the business
why_this_matters: A strong source for choosing better starting points before custom frontend work begins.
reusable_lesson: Good starter selection can save time, but only if the structure matches the product job.

name: Vercel Admin Dashboard Template
teaches: dashboard shell composition
auth plus data-aware starter structure
navigation, cards, tables, and KPI surface patterns
how to start a serious internal app without inventing every screen from zero
avoid: forcing a dashboard shell onto products that are really marketing-first
why_this_matters: A practical official starter for operational product surfaces and admin-heavy apps.
reusable_lesson: A useful dashboard starter should save structure work while still leaving room for product-specific hierarchy.

name: Next.js SaaS Starter
teaches: how a serious SaaS starter organizes public and authenticated surfaces
billing, auth, and product shell boundaries
good default route structure for a real software business
how to begin with production-oriented scaffolding instead of toy structure
avoid: assuming starter business logic equals your product strategy
keeping generic SaaS copy or layout choices after the initial setup
why_this_matters: Useful when a project needs a real SaaS foundation instead of an isolated page or demo.
reusable_lesson: A good SaaS starter reduces setup drag, but the product still needs its own point of view.

name: Next.js Official Examples
teaches: many ways official Next.js features are structured
reference implementations for common framework patterns
starter breadth across routing, content, auth, and integrations
how to inspect framework-native examples before custom implementation
avoid: reading every example instead of picking the ones relevant to the task
mistaking framework examples for finished product design
why_this_matters: A broad official reference bank for framework-native implementation patterns.
reusable_lesson: Examples are strongest when used as focused pattern references, not as a giant pile to imitate.

name: Mantine Next App Template
focus: clean React and Next.js starter ergonomics
teaches: clean starter structure for React and Next.js projects
Mantine theme wiring and styling ergonomics
maintainable defaults for teams moving quickly
how to start polished without overcomplicating the stack
avoid: letting starter defaults define the entire product personality
keeping framework-demo aesthetics instead of shaping the interface intentionally
why_this_matters: A clean starter for products that want strong ergonomics and calm defaults.
reusable_lesson: A simple starter is powerful when it stays easy to reshape into a product with real taste.
